channel.title: Oracle on bBG — CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Oracle on bBG — CTF Writeups

item.title: Shuffled OX — Known-Plaintext Attack on Random Alphabet Substitution
item.description: Recover a random alphabet permutation through a known-plaintext oracle, then decrypt an encrypted flag.

item.title: Cry3 — AES-CBC Bit-Flip on Token Parser
item.description: Exploit AES-CBC’s malleability to flip index bytes in a server-parsed token and recover flag chunks.

item.title: 5DES — Controlled Key Derivation Attack
item.description: Control the 5DES key derivation function with chosen inputs to produce a predictable key, then use the server’s decrypt oracle to recover the flag.
